Friend --

In the 2010 and 2014 midterm elections, Republicans vastly outperformed Democrats. And in 2016, Republicans won the White House, Senate, House, and governorships across the country.

[**_The problem is that Democratic voter turnout has hit an all-time low._**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc10/73a2bc12/3f2a8e2f/1fcd0c08/3200058530/VEsD/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/pledge-to-vote?utm_campaign=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_content=5+-+The+problem+is+that+Democratic+voter+tur")

And if Democrats don't get to the polls in 2018, Pennsylvania could end up with a Republican governor that would roll back all the progress Governor Wolf has made over the past few years.
**[So please, help re-elect Governor Wolf and Democrats across Pennsylvania. Take the pledge to vote in 2018 -> ](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc10/73a2bc12/3f2a8e2f/1fcd0c0f/3200058530/VEsA/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/pledge-to-vote?utm_campaign=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_content=6+-+So+FIRSTNAMEplease+help+reelect+Governor")**
[](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc10/73a2bc12/3f2a8e2f/1fcd0c0e/3200058530/VEsB/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/pledge-to-vote?utm_campaign=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_content=7")

When Democrats vote, we win. Conor Lamb winning in the deep red 18th district of Pennsylvania proves that we have the momentum we need to win. And the 2018 midterm elections will be one of the most important elections in our lifetime.

In 2021, every state will have to draw new congressional maps. And Democratic governors are the only line of defense from Republican gerrymanders.

That means if we want fair, unbiased maps for years to come, we need to elect Democratic governors like Tom Wolf this November!

**[The only way we can do it is if Democrats commit to voting this November. As one of our top supporters, we hope you 'll be one of the first to sign our pledge today:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc10/73a2bc12/3f2a8e2f/1fcd0c0d/3200058530/VEsO/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/pledge-to-vote?utm_campaign=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_content=8+-+The+only+way+we+can+do+it+is+if+Democrat")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Pledge-to-Vote](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc10/73a2bc12/3f2a8e2f/1fcd0c0c/3200058530/VEsP/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/pledge-to-vote?utm_campaign=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180408_pledge_clk_clq_act_vot_&utm_content=9+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomPledgetoVote")**

subject: The latest
body:
Gov. John Kasich issued the following statement today following
reports of a Syrian government-led use of chemical weapons that
left dozens of civilians, men, women and children, dead and
hundreds more injured.

Statement on Reported Syrian Chemical Weapons Attack:

Gov. John Kasich issued the
following statement today following reports of a Syrian
government-led use of chemical weapons that left dozens of
civilians, men, women and children, dead and hundreds more
injured:

New Hampshire:

Gov. Kasich was in New Hampshire
this past Tuesday at the invitation to participate in the New
England College's President's Speaker Series. See more below:

Watch Full Event (via C-SPAN):

Interview with CNN's Dana Bash:

Wait Wait...Don't Tell Me!

Gov. Kasich was a special guest
on NPR's "Wait Wait...Don't Tell Me!" show that was taped in
front of a live audience in Columbus, Ohio this past week. Listen
to his segment (here).

Gov. Kasich Remarks on the 50th
Anniversary of the Death of Rev. Martin Luther King, Jr.

Gov. Kasich posted a short video
on social media about his friendship with Rev. Bernice King and
the powerful impact of his visit to the Rev. Martin Luther King,
Jr's boyhood home in Alabama. Watch below:

More Protections for Domestic
Violence Victims:

This past week, Gov. Signed a
bipartisan bill into law a that provides stronger protections for
domestic violence victims. Read more (here).

Axios Event - The Workforce
Impacts of the Digital Age:

On Monday, Gov. Kasich
participated in an discussion hosted by Axios about the impacts
that new technologies are having on Ohio and America's workforce
and how states can adapt and modernize for this change:

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

-Team Kasich

help us continue paying for the tools to advance Gov. Kasich's
critical message, please consider making a donation (here).

for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.

Derek,

This week, Tim officially kicked off his re-election campaign by traveling across Virginia to share this campaign's mission: building a Virginia that works **_for all_**. He spoke at more than 20 events, from rallies to roundtable discussions, to champion the values we're fighting for: access to good jobs, health care, education, security, and equality for every single Virginian.

But while Tim was traveling to every corner of the Commonwealth, spreading our inclusive and progressive message, **Corey Stewart -_one of the top Republicans running against Tim_ \- was telling his supporters that he knew exactly how to defeat Tim this November:**
"The Democrats are arrogant and cocky, and they think they've got Virginia. They think it's blue ... None of these Democrats is going to give Tim Kaine a dime because they don't think he needs it, and that's why we're going to sneak up on him and defeat him." \- Corey Stewart, during a campaign event
---
While some people may think Virginia isn't a battleground state anymore, we know better: **Republicans are still winning elections here in the Commonwealth, and if they have more resources than we do, they could win Tim 's Senate seat in November.** That's why we aren't taking a single thing for granted - and we hope you aren't, either.

[Show Corey Stewart and Republicans that they're wrong about Democrats not supporting our campaign: Chip in now >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1350/3e0906/62c83c06/3e34a56f/3384373198/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180408_1_FR_JN_Stewart-fwd&amount=25")

clean_body: | "" | | Here in Pennsylvania, we know a lot about the consequences of Republican gerrymandering. That's why I am leading the way for a movement to end gerrymandering nationwide. subject: Don't let the GOP rig the map

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf02/2a380d31/a745c38/f1f874/3853390345/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf02/2a380d31/a745c38/f1f874/3853390345/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
If we were to tell you that the GOP was handpicking their voters, you'd be pretty alarmed, right?
That's exactly what they're trying to do.
Far-right Republicans want to draw district lines in a way that dramatically favors their own party, _even in places where voters strongly oppose the GOP 's platform._
This is just one of myriad ways that conservative extremists are trying to skew representation in Congress, and we have to hold them accountable. [**Please click here to tell Republicans to stop manipulating our electoral system and to protect fair and representative elections.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf02/2a380d31/a745c38/f1f875/3853390345/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymanderingnow/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_gerrymandering-up%3Frefcode%3D2018_gerrymanderingja_up")
Republican-gerrymandered districts are easy to spot. Their contours snake through the map, cutting out Democratic strongholds block by block, clearing an easier path to victory for the GOP's candidates.
Gerrymandering isn't just unfair -- it's undemocratic. Voters should choose their Representatives, not the other way around.
[**If fair representation is important to you, sign our petition to call on Republicans to stop rigging the map.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf02/2a380d31/a745c38/f1f875/3853390345/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymanderingnow/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_gerrymandering-up%3Frefcode%3D2018_gerrymanderingja_up")
Thanks for taking action on this important issue,
Team Maggie
